2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch adds a function io_uring_is_kmbuf_ring() to the Linux kernel's io_uring module, which checks if a buffer ring is managed by the kernel at a specified buffer group. The function returns true if it finds such a ring and false otherwise. This preparatory patch is part of an upcoming fuse kernel-managed buffer support, where the server needs to ensure that the registered buffer ring is a kernel-managed one. The function is implemented in io_uring/kbuf.c and exported as a symbol for use by other parts of the kernel.
